valueDerivation.parsedExpression: Right ( "00" : Trim ( L_1.IND_TIPO_COLEG ) , 2 ) : Right ( "00000" : Trim ( L_1.NUM_COLEG ) , 5 )
Trim ( Trim ( L_1.NOM_APELLIDO_1 ) : " " : Trim ( L_1.NOM_APELLIDO ) : ", " : Trim ( L_1.NOM_NOMBRE ) )

properties.sql.select_statement: SELECT A.COD_PETICION,                                               CHAR('PROVEEDORES', 20) AS TIPO_INFORME,                             CHAR('1', 1) AS HOJA,                                                A.COD_DELEGACION,                                                    A.NOM_DELEGACION,                                                    A.COD_PROVEEDOR,                                                     VWPROVEED.IND_TIPO_COLEG,                                            VWPROVEED.NUM_COLEG,                                                 VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO_1,                                            VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO,                                              VWPROVEED.NOM_NOMBRE,                                                A.MES_PAGO,                                                          VALUE(SUM(VALUE(A.EUR_IMP_BRUTO, 0)), 0) AS EUR_IMP_BRUTO ,          A.MIN_MES_PAGO,                                                      A.MAX_MES_PAGO,                                                      A.NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR AS NUM_MES_ANNO_PETICION                        FROM                                                                 (                                                                    SELECT TMAPROCE.COD_PETICION,                                            TPAGOPRO.COD_DELEGACION,                                             TDELEGA.NOMB_DELEGA AS NOM_DELEGACION,                               TPAGOPRO.COD_PROVEEDOR,                                              CHAR(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CHAR(                                               VALUE(TPAGOPRO.FEC_TRANSFERENCIA, '0001-01-01')), 1, 4),             SUBSTR(CHAR(                                                         VALUE(TPAGOPRO.FEC_TRANSFERENCIA, '0001-01-01')), 6, 2)),            20 ) AS MES_PAGO,                                                  VALUE((TPAGOPRO.EUR_IMP_VALORACION +                                  TPAGOPRO.EUR_IMP_REGULARIZA +                                     TPAGOPRO.EUR_PAGO_FIJO -                                             TPAGOPRO.EUR_IMP_DESCUENTO), 0)   AS EUR_IMP_BRUTO,                  CHAR(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CHAR(YEAR(DATE(                                       LAST_DAY(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION - 14 MONTHS) + 1 DAY))),              1, 4),                                                               SUBSTR(CHAR(DATE(                                                    LAST_DAY(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION - 14 MONTHS) + 1 DAY)),               6, 2)), 6                                                            ) AS MIN_MES_PAGO,                                               CHAR(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CHAR(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION), 1, 4),                      SUBSTR(CHAR(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION), 6, 2)), 6                     ) AS MAX_MES_PAGO,                                               TMAPROCE.FEC_VALOR_DESDE AS NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR                       FROM DBA1.TMAPROCE TMAPROCE, DBA1.TPAGOPRO TPAGOPRO,                  DBA1.TDELEGA TDELEGA                                                WHERE                                                                   TPAGOPRO.FEC_TRANSFERENCIA BETWEEN CHAR((DATE(                      LAST_DAY(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION - 14 MONTHS) + 1 DAY)))               AND TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION               and tpagopro.cod_delegacion = 100                                             AND TPAGOPRO.COD_DELEGACION    = TDELEGA.COD_DELE                    AND (TPAGOPRO.COD_DELEGACION = TMAPROCE.COD_DELEGACION )             AND TMAPROCE.TIPO_OPERACION = 15                                     AND TMAPROCE.COD_peticion = 16904                                      AND TMAPROCE.FEC_BAJA IS NULL                                        AND TPAGOPRO.FEC_BAJA IS NULL                                     ) AS A, DBA1.VWPROVEED VWPROVEED                                     WHERE VWPROVEED.NUM_PROVEED = A.COD_PROVEEDOR                        GROUP BY A.COD_PETICION,                                                      A.COD_DELEGACION,                                                    A.NOM_DELEGACION,                                                    A.COD_PROVEEDOR,                                                     VWPROVEED.IND_TIPO_COLEG,                                            VWPROVEED.NUM_COLEG,                                                 VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO_1,                                            VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO,                                              VWPROVEED.NOM_NOMBRE,                                                A.MES_PAGO,                                                          A.MIN_MES_PAGO,                                                      A.MAX_MES_PAGO,                                                      A.NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR                                     UNION ALL  SELECT A.COD_PETICION,                                                CHAR('PROVEEDORES', 20) AS TIPO_INFORME,                              CHAR('1', 1) AS HOJA,                                                 A.COD_DELEGACION,                                                     A.NOM_DELEGACION,                                                     A.COD_PROVEEDOR,                                                      VWPROVEED.IND_TIPO_COLEG,                                             VWPROVEED.NUM_COLEG,                                                  VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO_1,                                             VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO,                                               VWPROVEED.NOM_NOMBRE,                                                 A.MES_PAGO,                                                           VALUE(SUM(VALUE(A.EUR_IMP_DISTRIBUIDO, 0)), 0)                        AS EUR_IMP_BRUTO,                                               A.MIN_MES_PAGO,                                                       A.MAX_MES_PAGO,                                                       A.NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR AS NUM_MES_ANNO_PETICION                         FROM                                                                  (                                                                      SELECT TMAPROCE.COD_PETICION,                                            TCPTOPRO.COD_DELEGACION,                                              TDELEGA.NOMB_DELEGA AS NOM_DELEGACION,                                TCPTOPRO.COD_REALIZADOR AS COD_PROVEEDOR,                             CHAR('ATRASADO', 20) AS MES_PAGO,                                     VALUE((TCPTOPRO.EUR_IMP_DISTRIBU), 0) AS EUR_IMP_DISTRIBUIDO,         CHAR(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CHAR(YEAR(DATE(                                     LAST_DAY(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION - 14 MONTHS) + 1 DAY))),               1, 4),                                                                SUBSTR(CHAR(DATE(                                                     LAST_DAY(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION - 14 MONTHS) + 1 DAY)),                6, 2)), 6                                                             ) AS MIN_MES_PAGO,                                                   CHAR(CONCAT(SUBSTR(CHAR(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION), 1, 4),                   SUBSTR(CHAR(TMAPROCE.FEC_PETICION), 6, 2)), 6                      ) AS MAX_MES_PAGO,                                                    TMAPROCE.FEC_VALOR_DESDE AS NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR                        FROM DBA1.TMAPROCE TMAPROCE, DBA1.TCPTOPRO TCPTOPRO,                  DBA1.TDELEGA TDELEGA                                                  WHERE                                                                  TCPTOPRO.NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR <                                          CAST(TMAPROCE.FEC_VALOR_DESDE AS DECIMAL(6))                           AND TCPTOPRO.COD_DELEGACION    = TDELEGA.COD_DELE                      AND (TCPTOPRO.COD_DELEGACION = TMAPROCE.COD_DELEGACION )               AND TMAPROCE.TIPO_OPERACION = 15                                       AND  TMAPROCE.COD_peticion = 16904                                        AND TMAPROCE.FEC_BAJA IS NULL                                          ) AS A, DBA1.VWPROVEED VWPROVEED                                       WHERE VWPROVEED.NUM_PROVEED = A.COD_PROVEEDOR                          GROUP BY A.COD_PETICION,                                                        A.COD_DELEGACION,                                                      A.NOM_DELEGACION,                                                      A.COD_PROVEEDOR,                                                       VWPROVEED.IND_TIPO_COLEG,                                              VWPROVEED.NUM_COLEG,                                                   VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO_1,                                              VWPROVEED.NOM_APELLIDO,                                                VWPROVEED.NOM_NOMBRE,                                                  A.MES_PAGO,                                                            A.MIN_MES_PAGO,                                                        A.MAX_MES_PAGO,                                                        A.NUM_MES_ANNO_VALOR                                          WITH UR;

StageVariables.Derivation: if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL" or trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO" then 0 else Trim ( L_3.MIN_MES_PAGO ) [ 1 , 4 ]
StageVariables.Name: svANOMIN

StageVariables.Derivation: if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL" or trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO" then 0 else Trim ( L_3.MIN_MES_PAGO ) [ 5 , 2 ]
StageVariables.Name: svMESMIN

StageVariables.Derivation: if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL" or trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO" then 0 else  Trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) [ 1 , 4 ]
StageVariables.Name: svANOACT

StageVariables.Derivation: if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL" or trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO" then 0 else  Trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) [ 5 , 2 ]
StageVariables.Name: svMESACT

StageVariables.Derivation: if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL" or trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO" then 0 else ( svANOACT - svANOMIN ) * 12
StageVariables.Name: svOFFSET

StageVariables.Derivation:
if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ACTUAL"  then
   15
else if  trim ( L_3.MES_PAGO ) = "ATRASADO"  then
            16
       else svMESACT + svOFFSET - svMESMIN +1
StageVariables.Name: svPOSICION
